ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Decision Tree, Neural Network) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Current version of the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last evaluation of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in instances */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the dataset */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "learning_evaluation_instances" INTEGER /* Number of instances used for learning evaluation */,
  "evaluation_time" REAL /* Evaluation time in CPU seconds */,
  "model_cost" REAL /* Model cost in RAM-Hours */,
  "classified_instances" INTEGER /* Number of classified instances */,
  "classifications_correct_percent" REAL /* Percentage of classifications correct */,
  "kappa_statistic_percent" REAL /* Kappa statistic in percent */,
  "kappa_temporal_statistic_percent" REAL /* Kappa temporal statistic in percent */,
  "kappa_m_statistic_percent" REAL /* Kappa M statistic in percent */,
  "f1_score_class_0_percent" REAL /* F1 Score for class 0 in percent */,
  "f1_score_class_1_percent" REAL /* F1 Score for class 1 in percent */,
  "recall_class_0_percent" REAL /* Recall for class 0 in percent */,
  "recall_class_1_percent" REAL /* Recall for class 1 in percent */,
  "gmean_percent" REAL /* GMean in percent */,
  "model_training_instances" INTEGER /* Number of instances used for model training */,
  "model_serialized_size_bytes" TEXT /* Size of the serialized model in bytes */,
  "gmean_time" REAL /* GMean per unit time */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the evaluation was performed (e.g., development, production) */,
  "evaluation_version" INTEGER /* Version of the model being evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the evaluation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device type from which the access was made (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the model version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the model version */,
  "version_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model file */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the serialized model file */,
  "file_size_bytes" TEXT /* Size of the model file in bytes */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the model file was uploaded */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the file to ensure integrity */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., uploaded, processed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_files_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the metric (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance_history" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "gmean_percent" REAL /* GMean in percent */,
  "f1_score_class_0_percent" REAL /* F1 Score for class 0 in percent */,
  "f1_score_class_1_percent" REAL /* F1 Score for class 1 in percent */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the performance record */,
  "performance_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the performance was recorded (e.g., development, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_history_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_status" TEXT /* Status of the permission (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
